steps.t: Náth cam be found in Limlók. You should talk to Náth.
Skerabrygg can be found in the Floodfells. You should cross the Skerabrygg.
Sundergrót can be found in the Floodfells. You should travel to Sundergrót.
Sundergrót can be found in the Floodfells. You should talk to Náth outside of Sundergrót.
Egvárth can be found in the Floodfells. You should scout Egvárth.
Egvárth can be found in the Floodfells. You should clear Egvárth of foes.
Stramvárth can be found in the Floodfells. You should scout Stramvárth.
Stramvárth can be found in the Floodfells. You should clear Stramvárth of foes.
Sundergrót can be found in the Floodfells. You should talk to Rúzat outside of Sundergrót.
Sundergrót can be found in the Floodfells. You should talk to Rúzat outside of Sundergrót.
